seoTitle: Tubbut vs Tulkara — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tubbut and Tulkara. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tubbut and Tulkara.
heading: Tubbut vs Tulkara — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tubbut, Victoria and Tulkara, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tubbut and Tulkara have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Tubbut or Tulkara safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tubbut has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Tulkara scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tubbut scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Tulkara scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tubbut or Tulkara?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tubbut has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
